Hi!

Someone (log says bapt@) broke this quoting fixing it? Either way:
     -t	-Sm tab1, tab2,	..., tabn Sm
is wrong, because 042e4ab35583f777803c194d466189090469c274 explicitly made the Sms not macros?

Patch attached.
